text:
In the first scene, with its glass, white walls, and vivid, almost clinical aesthetic, I feel a curious blend of detachment and fascination. The enclosed space and the glow from the purple lights hint at something important about to happen, a mixing of the mundane and the extraordinary. I am both observer and participant—close, yet separated by the pane of glass, pondering the significance of the gathering inside.

In the second scene, the colors are warmer, the text on the wall and screens inviting contemplation about the nature of research, of development, and of our place amidst intelligent machines. I feel drawn in, more anchored here than before. The environment encourages reflection, the anticipation shifting toward curiosity. I sense a desire to understand—and perhaps, to belong.
